title: HU12 0AD, White Rose Farms Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/ZP3026SN/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: White Rose Farms Limited Installation name: Peach Tree Farm Permit number: EPR/ZP3026SN/A001  "
